notices.title: Midterm Exam Schedule
notices.content: The midterm exams will be held from October 15th to July 20th. Please check the schedule on the student portal for your specific exam times.

notices.title: Library Hours Extended
notices.content: The library will be open until midnight during the exam period to provide students with a quiet study environment.

notices.title: Career Fair Next Week
notices.content: The annual career fair will take place on June 5th. Representatives from various companies will be present to discuss job opportunities and internships.

notices.title: New Course Offerings
notices.content: Several new courses have been added to the curriculum for the upcoming semester. Please check the course catalog for more details.

notices.title: Student Counseling Services
notices.content: Counseling services are available for students who may need support during stressful times. Please contact the student affairs office to schedule an appointment.
